__doc__: Non-additive patches to Filament's upstream filament.d.ts — the things TypeScript
declaration merging (used by filament.patch.d.ts) cannot express. Applied by
js/build.gradle.kts to the assembled d.ts before the $->_ normalisation, so names
here use the upstream '$' separator. All entries are faithful to jsbindings.cpp.
replacements   - literal find/replace on the d.ts text. Used to correct fields the
d.ts types wrongly (merging can't retype an existing member).
staticMembers  - static (class_function) members injected into a class body. Karakum
renders a merged TS `namespace` as a separate object, so statics
can't be added by merging; they're spliced into the class instead.

replacements.__doc__: PickingQueryResult.renderable is an Emval-wrapped Entity, not a number; the actuals call entity.getId() on it. 'renderable:' is unique to this interface.
Upstream typo: gltfio$FilamentAsset.getAssetInstances() is misspelled 'geAssetInstances' in the d.ts (the embind binding is spelled correctly).

Texture: static isTextureFormatMipmappable(engine: Engine, format: Texture$InternalFormat): boolean;
static validatePixelFormatAndType(internalFormat: Texture$InternalFormat, format: PixelDataFormat, type: PixelDataType): boolean;
